zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sutton III於1329年出生在英國英格蘭爾馬爾帕斯時，他的父親John Sutton II22歲，母親Isabel Cherleton22歲。他於1357年12月25日與Katherine Stafford結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年9月24日在法國享年40歲，埋葬在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登瓦爾登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sutton III was born in 1329, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Sutton II, was 22 and his mother, Isabel Cherleton, was 22. He married Katherine Stafford on 25 December 1357. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 24 September 1369, in France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sutton III est né en 1329, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Sutton II, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel Cherleton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Stafford le 25 décembre 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1369, à France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre.

Dezember 1357 Katherine Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Lui sposato Katherine Stafford il 25 dicembre 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 settembre 1369, nel Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton IIIが1329年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで生まれた時，父John Sutton IIは22歳，母Isabel Cherletonは22歳であった。1357年12月25日にKatherine Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年9月24日にフランスで40歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンワルデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton III(이)가 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맬파스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sutton II(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Cherleton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1357년 12월 25일 Katherine Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 9월 24일 프랑스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 사프런 월든 월든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Katherine Stafford em 25 de dezembro de 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Walden Abbey, Saffron Walden, Essex, Eng: валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sutton III родился в 1329 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Sutton II было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Cherleton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Stafford 25 декабря 1357 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 сентября 1369 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности валден эбби, саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия.
